info.title: CarsXE
info.description: Access comprehensive vehicle data including VIN decoding, specifications, market values, license plate recognition, vehicle history, recalls, images, and diagnostic codes for automotive applications.

get.description: Checks whether the provided CarsXE API key is valid and active.

active.description: Whether the API key is active
active.title: Active

get.x-ms-summary: Decode VIN & Get Full Vehicle Specs
get.description: Decode VIN and retrieve comprehensive vehicle specifications including attributes, colors, equipment, warranties, and deep VIN decode information.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid or missing VIN

get.description: Decode Vehicle Identification Numbers with worldwide support for international vehicles. Returns comprehensive vehicle data including specifications, dimensions, and technical details.

permitted_trailer_load_without_brakes_kg.description: Permitted trailer load without brakes in kg
permitted_trailer_load_without_brakes_kg.title: Trailer Load Without Brakes (kg)

get.x-ms-summary: Get Safety Recall Data for VIN
get.description: Retrieve safety recall data and campaign information for a specific vehicle by VIN. Returns NHTSA recall campaigns, affected components, risk descriptions, and remedy information.

uuid.description: Unique identifier for this recall lookup
uuid.title: UUID

has_recalls.description: Whether this vehicle has any recalls
has_recalls.title: Has Recalls

recall_count.description: Number of recalls for this vehicle
recall_count.title: Recall Count

recalls.title: Recalls
recalls.description: Array of recall campaigns affecting this vehicle

404.description: Not Found - No recall data available for this VIN

get.description: Decode license plate information by plate number and country. State is required for US, AU, CA, and PK. District is required for Pakistan. Returns vehicle identification details including VIN, make, model, year, color, and specifications.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Country code (US, CA, AU, UK, PK, BR, IN, MX, NZ, IT, ES, IE). Optional for US only, defaults to 'US'.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State or province code. Required for US, CA, AU, and PK. Examples: CA, NY (US), ON (CA), NSW (AU)

parameters.name: district
parameters.description: District code. Required only for Pakistan (PK).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid plate or missing required state/district parameters

404.description: Not Found - Plate not found in database

get.x-ms-summary: Fetch Vehicle Images by Make & Model
get.description: Fetch vehicle images by make, model, year, trim, color, angle, and other optional parameters. Returns image URLs with metadata including dimensions, thumbnails, and publication dates.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Vehicle trim level (e.g., SR5, Limited, Sport)

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Vehicle color (e.g., blue, red, white, black)

link.description: Direct link to the full-size image
link.title: Image Link

contextLink.description: Link to the webpage containing the image
contextLink.title: Context Link

hostPageDomainFriendlyName.description: Friendly name of the hosting domain
hostPageDomainFriendlyName.title: Host Domain

accentColor.description: Dominant accent color in hex format
accentColor.title: Accent Color

datePublished.description: Date when the image was published
datePublished.title: Date Published

images.title: Images
images.description: Array of vehicle images with metadata

query.title: Query
query.description: Echo of the query parameters used

400.description: Bad Request - Missing required parameters (make and model)

404.description: Not Found - No images found for the specified vehicle

get.x-ms-summary: Estimate Vehicle Market Value by VIN
get.description: Estimate vehicle market value based on VIN using millions of historical vehicle sales data. Returns wholesale, retail, trade-in values with condition-based pricing, mileage adjustments, and optional equipment valuations.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: US state code for regional pricing adjustments (e.g., CA, NY, TX)

whole_xclean.title: Wholesale Extra Clean
whole_xclean.description: Wholesale value for extra clean condition

retail_xclean.title: Retail Extra Clean
retail_xclean.description: Retail value for extra clean condition

404.description: Not Found - No market value data available for this VIN

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive vehicle history including title information, brands, junk and salvage records, insurance records, odometer readings, and ownership history by VIN.

vinChanged.description: Whether the VIN has been changed
vinChanged.title: VIN Changed

junkAndSalvageInformation.title: Junk and Salvage Information
junkAndSalvageInformation.description: Records from junk and salvage entities

VehicleObtainedDate.description: Date vehicle was obtained by insurance
VehicleObtainedDate.title: Obtained Date

currentTitleInformation.title: Current Title Information
currentTitleInformation.description: Current title and historic title records

404.description: Not Found - No history data available for this VIN

post.description: Read and decode license plates from images using AI/ML recognition technology. Supports image URLs. Returns detected plate numbers, region codes, confidence scores, and vehicle type with bounding box coordinates.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: Content type for the request body

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: URL of the image containing the license plate

upload_url.description: URL of the image containing the license plate
upload_url.title: Upload URL

200.description: Successful response - Plate recognized from image

xmin.description: Minimum X coordinate of bounding box
xmin.title: X Min

ymin.description: Minimum Y coordinate of bounding box
ymin.title: Y Min

xmax.description: Maximum X coordinate of bounding box
xmax.title: X Max

ymax.description: Maximum Y coordinate of bounding box
ymax.title: Y Max

box.title: Plate Bounding Box
box.description: Coordinates of the plate location in the image

type.description: Detected vehicle type (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck)
type.title: Vehicle Type

results.title: Recognition Results
results.description: Array of detected plates and vehicle information

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid image URL or image format

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Image could not be processed or no plates detected

post.x-ms-summary: Extract VINs from Images using OCR
post.description: Extract Vehicle Identification Numbers (VINs) from images using Optical Character Recognition (OCR). Supports image URLs. Returns detected VIN with confidence score, bounding box coordinates, and alternative candidates.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: Content type for the request body

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: URL of the image containing the VIN

upload_url.description: URL of the image containing the VIN
upload_url.title: Upload URL

200.description: Successful response - VIN extracted from image

xmin.description: Minimum X coordinate of bounding box
xmin.title: X Min

ymin.description: Minimum Y coordinate of bounding box
ymin.title: Y Min

xmax.description: Maximum X coordinate of bounding box
xmax.title: X Max

ymax.description: Maximum Y coordinate of bounding box
ymax.title: Y Max

box.title: Bounding Box
box.description: Coordinates of the VIN location in the image

candidates.title: Candidates
candidates.description: Alternative VIN interpretations with confidence scores

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid image URL or image format

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Image could not be processed or no VIN detected

get.x-ms-summary: Query Vehicle by Year, Make, Model & Trim
get.description: Query vehicle information by year, make, model, and optional trim level. Returns comprehensive vehicle details including MSRP, features, colors, dimensions, warranty, and optional packages.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Vehicle trim level (e.g., XLE, Limited, Sport) - Optional

200.description: Successful response - Vehicle data retrieved by year, make, model

name.description: Full vehicle name with trim and specs
name.title: Name

trimOptions.title: Trim Options
trimOptions.description: Available trim options for this vehicle

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid or missing parameters

404.description: Not Found - No vehicle found matching the specified year, make, model, and trim

get.description: Decode OBD (On-Board Diagnostics) error and diagnostic codes to get descriptions and troubleshooting information. Access a library of over 3000 OBD codes and their matching vehicle diagnosis.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: OBD diagnostic code (e.g., P0115, P0420, C0035)

diagnosis.description: Diagnosis description for the OBD code
diagnosis.title: Diagnosis

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid OBD code format

404.description: Not Found - OBD code not found in database
